name: Heroic Contact Form
description: Self-hostable contact form. Drop the widget bundle on any CDN, deploy the single-tenant Lambda to your own AWS account, point the widget at it.

formId.description: Optional tag added to the email subject. Useful when one operator handles multiple landings; the Lambda does NOT route on this field.

fields.description: Comma-separated list of visible fields. Allowed: name, email, phone, message.

required.description: Comma-separated subset of fields that are required.

locale.description: Locale for built-in labels and validation messages.

theme.description: Visual variant matched to the host landing's appearance.

target.description: CSS selector of the mount node (e.g. '#contact-section'). Defaults to the script tag's parent.

honeypotName.description: Hidden field name used as a bot honeypot.

mode.description: Display mode. `inline` renders the form in place; `modal` renders a button with mail icon that opens a dialog containing the form. The dialog auto-closes after a successful submit.

triggerLabel.description: Label shown on the modal-mode trigger button. Defaults to a localized 'Contact us' string.

modalTitle.description: Title rendered in the modal header. Defaults to a localized 'Write us a message' string.

iconOnly.description: In `modal` mode, render the trigger as an icon-only square button (envelope SVG without text). The label is preserved as the accessible name (aria-label + visually-hidden span).

phoneNumber.description: Optional phone number rendered as a sibling action button next to the mail trigger. Click → `tel:` link. Use the dial-friendly format (e.g. `+393332627187`).

accent.description: CSS color for the submit + trigger button background and focus ring. Accepts hex, rgb(), hsl(), or `var(--your-token)`. Defaults to `var(--color-accent)` if the host page exposes it, otherwise a slate fallback.

accentText.description: CSS color for text + icon on top of the accent background. Defaults to `var(--color-bg)` then white.

background.description: Modal panel background colour. Defaults to `var(--color-bg)` then white.

textColor.description: Foreground text colour inside the form / modal. Defaults to `var(--color-text)` then `currentColor`.

muted.description: Colour used for input placeholders. Defaults to `var(--color-muted)` then slate.

inputBorder.description: Input border colour. Defaults to `var(--color-line)` then `currentColor`.

inputBackground.description: Input background colour. Defaults to transparent (so inputs blend into the panel).

inputText.description: Input text colour. Defaults to the form text colour.
